title: Registry Commit Lifecycle Schema
description: Defines the deterministic lifecycle and validation pipeline through which a CIR transitions from external input into a committed Registry State entry within a Network Instance.

lifecycle_id.description: Unique identifier for this commit lifecycle execution

instance_origin.description: Network Instance executing the commit lifecycle

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when lifecycle execution began

final_state.description: Terminal outcome of the commit lifecycle execution

stages.description: Ordered deterministic sequence of lifecycle stages executed during commit evaluation

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this stage executed

reason.description: Optional explanation for non-passing stage outcomes

input_cir_hash.description: Cryptographic or deterministic hash reference of the CIR under evaluation. MUST represent canonical CIR state excluding federation_signals, validation_context, and result_metadata.

validation_context.description: Non-authoritative runtime context used during evaluation

federation_signals.description: Advisory federation metadata used for context-aware validation. MUST be treated as non-authoritative. MUST NOT influence deterministic commit outcome, registry state transitions, or validation pass/fail decisions.

policy_version.description: Version identifier for local policy reference only. MUST NOT alter registry commit logic or override deterministic validation rules.

result_metadata.description: Non-authoritative diagnostic metadata for auditing commit decisions
